title: MTT Log-Det Estimator for Coulomb Free Energy
description: Implement stochastic log-det estimator on Coulomb-weighted graph Laplacian. Uses Hutchinson probing + Lanczos/Chebyshev polynomial approximation. O(N*K*M) cost.
milestone: Demo on 256-atom water box, <5% error vs dense Laplacian eigendecomposition
efa_notes: 9/9 acceptance tests pass (test_efa_coulomb.py). JIT pattern: functools.partial(efa_lebedev_coulomb_energy, params=params) — EFAParams numpy fields are not hashable so static_argnames cannot be used. MTT unblocked.

title: Prolix × xtrax 0.4 rewire epic (umbrella)
description: Umbrella for hybrid pin-first + water-parity-gated cut. See epic spec. Leaves XR-PIN…XR-KILL-FORK on critical path; XR-A2A3 sibling.
notes: Epic closed after XR-BUCKET (#746) on tick10
challenge_summary: All XR leaf children completed 2026-07-10.

title: Pin single xtrax version floor + CI assert
description: Lock one xtrax floor across main path-dep and worktree; CI asserts xtrax.__version__. Align file:// vs PyPI 0.3 pin policy.
challenge_summary: PyPI pin xtrax>=0.4.0a5,<0.5; check_xtrax_pin.py + CI step; path/editable rejected. Bookkeeping closed 2026-07-09.
notes: Implemented earlier; backlog/ROLLUP closed 2026-07-09

title: Adopt MemoryBudget; drop secondary demotion
description: Wire xtrax.tiling.MemoryBudget + lowered_memory_estimate/device_memory_budget in xtrax_adapter; delete secondary while estimate_memory demotion loop.
challenge_summary: 1A locked; MemoryBudget live; secondary demotion deleted; BudgetInfeasibleError fail-loud.
notes: Implemented 2026-07-09; see .praxia/docs/specs/260709_xr-budget.md

title: make_axis_dispatch for EnsemblePlan axes

notes: Implemented 2026-07-09; multi-axis debt praxia #3287

title: Fitting↔MD strategy+dispatch equality fixture
description: Pytest comparing fitting vs MD planner decisions on strategy type and batch_size, plus runtime dispatch agreement. Not claim-tier.
challenge_summary: Option 1: shared xtrax in test; SHADOW_AXES; strategy-type + dispatch asserts.
notes: Implemented 2026-07-09; production fitting still greedy until FIT-FLIP

title: Flip fitting planner onto shared xtrax path
description: make_fitting_planner / run/spec.py must not call prolix greedy BatchPlanner.plan(); use shared adapter path after BUDGET.
challenge_summary: plan_with_xtrax flip; resolve_device_budget_bytes; kill+thin-wrapper parity.
notes: Implemented 2026-07-09

title: Bathos confirmatory OpenMM TIP3P water parity
description: Confirmatory bathos campaign + claim.bth.toml vs OpenMM on TIP3P; numeric ΔE/ΔF/T gates; residual=rewire falsified.
challenge_summary: Campaign 5ffe2644 pass on Titanix: |ΔE|=0.040, force_rmse=0.011, mean_T=303.6 K. Sparse excl fix; liquid-density T fixture. XR-KILL-FORK unblocked.
notes: 2026-07-09 delivery B; claim .bth/claims/xr-parity-omm-water.claim.toml; run cbea8064; outputs/xr_parity_omm_tip3p_final.json

title: Delete prolix BatchPlanner greedy fork
description: Remove competing BatchPlanner.plan greedy; thin re-exports of xtrax types; rewrite V7 joint-budget tests (do not delete). Paper epic gated on this.
challenge_summary: Greedy loop deleted; plan() aliases plan_with_xtrax; V7 joint-budget rewrite; structural kill gates green. Paper/B1-full AC8 gate lifted.
notes: Implemented 2026-07-09; see .praxia/docs/specs/260709_xr-kill-fork.md

title: Sprint A A2 exclusions + A3 settle-dt

title: Protein OpenMM parity after Sprint A

notes: 2026-07-10 tick6: exception energy fix + static parity gate
challenge_summary: exception_* in energy_fn_from_bundle; 2GB1 ΔE≈0.001 force_rmse≈2e-6; pytest green.

title: CarrySpec for MD step/replica Scan axes

notes: Implemented 2026-07-09

title: DedupGather for duplicate-topology ensembles
description: DedupSpec/DedupGather for multi-seed/temp/conformer batches sharing topology (K≪N). Host unique_indices before JIT. Promoted after user pushback.
notes: Implemented 2026-07-09; EnsemblePlan wire out of scope
challenge_summary: DedupSpec→DedupGather planning; execute via axis_dispatch (not make_axis_dispatch); N_MOLS forced homogeneous; dispatch_n_mols still rejects DedupGather.

title: Compose proxide XTC writer with xtrax sink protocol
description: MD traj output via proxide XtcWriter + xtrax SinkSpec/AxisBoundary io_callback composition. Explicitly NOT xtrax ZarrStagingSink. Zarr rejected for MD traj.
notes: Implemented 2026-07-09; proxide write still stub — mdtraj interim
challenge_summary: Proxide XtcWriter is a Rust stub; lock mdtraj XTCTrajectoryFile behind XtcWriterBackend; XtcFrameSink implements xtrax Sink; EnsemblePlan.run(xtc_path=) single-bundle flush; Zarr rejected.

notes: 2026-07-10 tick9: completed
